name: FerroFlux · Workflow 2 — Daily Market Harvest → Kafka

nodes.name: Daily 06:00 Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires once a day at 06:00 server time. Adjust cron as needed.

nodes.name: Fetch Steel Indices
nodes.notes: Replace URL + credential with your real steel-index / spot-price provider. Returns raw JSON quotes.

nodes.name: Scrub & Structure
nodes.notes: Normalizes provider fields → market_clean-compatible schema and rejects empty/garbage payloads.

nodes.name: Publish → Kafka (steel_market_prices)
nodes.notes: Kafka credential: broker = kafka:29092 (inside steel-network), clientId = n8n-market-harvest. Topic steel_market_prices is consumed by Spark Structured Streaming (streaming_etl.py).
